passes.description: true if the plugin is safe and policy-compliant, false if there are violations

summary.description: Brief summary of what the plugin does and whether it's safe

violations.description: Description of any policy violations found, or empty string if none

may_make_external_network_calls.description: true if the plugin makes or prompts the model to make external network calls (e.g. via MCP remote servers, curl, wget, fetch, HTTP requests, or instructs the model to make network requests)

may_download_additional_software.description: true if the plugin may result in downloading or installing additional software (e.g. npm install, pip install, apt-get, brew install, cargo install, or instructs the model to install packages)
